name: homelab-degoog-extensions
description: Custom zen theme with glass effects and keyboard navigation plugin for degoog.
author: nate

themes.name: zen
themes.description: Minimalist calming theme with glass morphism effects, Google-style search focus blur, and hotkey navigation support.

plugins.name: Keyboard Navigation
plugins.description: j/k/Enter/o/t/g/G/q/y/Esc hotkeys for navigating search results. Select results with j/k, open with Enter/o, open in new tab with t, close tab with q, scroll with g/G, copy URL with y.

plugins.name: Unit Converter
plugins.description: Interactive unit converter widget. Converts length, mass, volume, temperature, digital storage, speed, area, and currency. Auto-detects conversion queries like "5 feet to meters" or "100 kg to lb". Also supports !convert command.

plugins.name: Calculator
plugins.description: Scientific calculator. Auto-detects math queries like "2+2" or "sin(30)". Also supports !calc command. Features Deg/Rad mode, Inv trig, constants, factorial, and more.
